title: Sustainability Strategy and Transformation
text:
The Sustainable Advantage: Build lasting impact through sustainability

You are subscribed to BCG's The Sustainable Advantage newsletter.

Manage Subscriptions

Our Approach to Sustainability Strategy
Companies that drive sustainability at scale create value in a host of ways, from capturing new growth markets and building new revenues streams to higher market valuations and enhanced employee retention. We help companies set a clear sustainability strategy that links positive environmental and societal outcomes to core drivers of competitive advantage and value creation, allowing them to transform their business models and value chains to capture the value they create.Defining Sustainability Vision, Strategy, and Ambition. A successful business sustainability strategy is anchored in purpose, focused on long-term value creation, and driven from the top of the organization. We work with clients to identify environmental, social, and governance (ESG) topics that are material to their industry today and in the future, and build an end-to-end sustainability strategy across the portfolio and an authentic sustainability narrative.Making the Core Business Sustainable. Companies must assess and enhance the sustainability of their existing portfolio and operations. We work with clients to decarbonize their operations by helping them engage their suppliers to build more sustainable supply chains, implement circularity in design, and provide approaches to value capture in the market.Driving New Sustainable Growth. Companies have a major opportunity to unlock new sources of growth through a sustainability transformation. We work with clients to build sustainability as advantage through sustainable business model innovation by helping them create new sustainable business offerings and ventures in areas such as green products, climate tech, and nature-based solutions. We also help them identify opportunities to capture growth and margin from sustainability scarcities, and shape new sustainable ecosystems that work to their advantage.Enabling the Sustainability Transformation. To achieve sustainability at scale, companies must ensure they have the right operating model, capabilities, and governance structure in place. We help by supporting the transformation. This includes data and analytics related to material ESG metrics, AI tools, and other digital capabilities to enable measurement and reporting, as well as the cultivation of partnerships and ecosystems.

Our Clients’ Success in Sustainability Transformation

Client Impact

How Dow Used the Carbon Footprint Ledger to Unlock a New Revenue Stream

Dow Inc. (Dow) turned its lower-emission production into a scalable new revenue stream. Dow’s chief technology & sustainability officer, chief commercial Officer, and IT director explain how the collaboration with BCG made that possible.

Learn More

Client Impact

Sustainability as a Competitive Anchor at Angelini Industries

See how a century-old family-owned company embeds sustainability, safety, and resilience into its purpose—partnering with BCG Quantis to drive lasting impact.

Learn More

Client Impact

Cheaper, Faster, Cleaner: Mining Reinvented by Nature

By harnessing nature’s genetic machinery, Genomines replaces mines with farms—delivering critical metals at scale while slashing costs, emissions, and timelines. A revolution in global mineral extraction has begun.

Learn More

Client Impact

How Sustainability Helped Generate Growth for a Leading Food Distributor

What happened when Sysco chose to ramp up its sustainability efforts? It created powerful opportunities for cost cutting and growth—for both the company and its clients.

Learn More

Client Impact

At JSW Steel, Sustainability Is Creating a Powerful Cost Advantage

From 2022 to 2024, JSW worked with BCG to take its sustainability mandate even further by launching SEED—Sustainable Energy Environment and Decarbonization—a large-scale decarbonization and operational efficiency pilot program with the potential to reduce CO2 emissions by 18 million tons per year (Mtpa) by 2030.

Learn More

Client Impact

How OCP Group Became a Front-Runner in Climate and Sustainability for Agriculture

A global leader in plant nutrition and phosphate fertilizers transformed its core business to provide agricultural solutions to ensure global food security and combat climate change.

Learn More
